title: GAGAKU Kids Hairdressing Set Realistic Girl Beauty Salon Playset Hair Styling Set with Blow Dryer Scissors and Stylist Accessories Pretend Play Toys For Girls Age 3-8
features: 【22 PCS Hair Salon Toys】GAGAKU Kids Hairdressing Set comes with 2*clips, 1*hair bands, 2*curling irons, 1*hair dryer, 2*styling blower heads, 1*styling bottle, 1*barber's belt pouch, 1*straightening splints, 1*base support stand, 2*combs, 2*scissors, 2*hair bands, 1*sunglasses, 1* apron, 1*styling balm bottle, 1*scratching clips.

【Realistic Hair Dryer】This battery powered hair dryer makes sounds and blows like a real hair dryer. (Note: Requires 2 AAA batteries. Not included) Creates a realistic hair styling experience and adds more dress up fun for girls.

【Learn While Playing】This educational pretend toy is perfect for your girls to invite their friends to play with them and learn about fashion salon, enhance their social and communication skills through play, improve hand-eye coordination and encourage your child's imagination and creativity!
【Safe and High Quality】We prioritise your child's safety, the play set is made of high quality ABS plastic, safe and lightweight. Your child can easily play with this hairdresser playset.

【Perfect Gift for Girls】Kids love to imitate adults' dress up, this toy is suitable for girls to do pretend play and satisfy their curiosity, it is a good gift choice for 3 4 5 years old girls for Princess Party/Birthday/Christmas/Holiday.
description: Product Description GAGAKU kids hairdressing set realistic beauty salon playset hair design set with hair dryer, scissors and stylist accessories is dedicated to letting kids discover the joys of life while playing. Complete Accessories Realistic Hair Dryer Hair Salon Set Decorative Accessories It is a very good learning toy that can help children imitate adult dress up and learn about fashion beauty salon. It can improve children's hand-eye coordination, exercise thinking, enhance imagination, and promote teamwork among children. The Best Pretend Hair Slon Set for Kids
